allow: PowerShell($profilePath = $PROFILE; $profileDir = Split-Path $profilePath -Parent; if \(-not \(Test-Path $profileDir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $profileDir | Out-Null }; if \(-not \(Test-Path $profilePath\)\) { New-Item -ItemType File -Path $profilePath | Out-Null }; $content = Get-Content $profilePath -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($content -notmatch "function\\s+cdnrf\\b"\) { Add-Content -Path $profilePath -Value "`r`nfunction cdnrf { Set-Location 'D:\\work1\\EMG\\nrf54l15_blinky2\\nrf54l15_blinky4' }`r`n" })
